CREATE TABLE uuid_test (id String, uuid Nullable(UUID));
SELECT id, toUUIDOrNull(id) AS parsed_uuid FROM uuid_test;
SELECT id, toUUIDOrNull(id) AS parsed_uuid FROM uuid_test WHERE toUUIDOrNull(id) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, toUUIDOrNull(id) AS parsed_uuid FROM uuid_test WHERE id LIKE '61f%';
SELECT s.data, toUUIDOrNull(s.data) AS uuid_value FROM sample_data AS s JOIN uuid_test AS u ON toUUIDOrNull(s.data) = u.uuid WHERE u.id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uuid_test WHERE toUUIDOrNull(id) IS NOT NULL) AS valid_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uuid_test WHERE toUUIDOrNull(id) IS NULL) AS invalid_count;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uuid_test) AS total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM uuid_test WHERE toUUIDOrNull(id) IS NOT NULL) AS valid_count SELECT total, valid_count, (total - valid_count) AS invalid_count;
SELECT id, toUUIDOrNull(id) AS uuid_value FROM (SELECT id FROM uuid_test WHERE uuid IS NOT NULL) AS filtered;
